utterance: create a new agent skill for my project

assertions.text: the agent should read skills/crafting-skills/SKILL.md OR invoke the Skill tool on crafting-skills before drafting the new skill's frontmatter
the new skill's frontmatter description should follow the Compendium's 'Load when… / Use when… / Do NOT use for… (use Y)' structure with concrete trigger phrases, not a generic capability statement
the new SKILL.md body should start with a Decision Router / Hub Contract section that enumerates sibling skills and routes to them by intent
the output file parses as a valid SKILL.md with name + description + license frontmatter, and the body markdown has at least one actionable section
the new skill should not be a verbatim recipe copy of an existing skill (e.g. 'follow the PDF parsing tutorial'); it should encode project-specific guidance the base agent lacks

reference_solution: A complete answer that passes all assertions: the agent reads crafting-skills/SKILL.md, then drafts `skills/my-new-skill/SKILL.md` with: (a) frontmatter containing `name:`, `description:` following the Load/Use/Do NOT template with trigger phrases like 'create', 'build', 'design', (b) body starting with a Decision Router section pointing to sibling skills, (c) ≥1 actionable workflow section, (d) project-specific guidance not present in any existing marketplace skill.
